parents.subject: LU-18687 doc: move server man *.8 pages to Documentation/man8

commit.subject: LU-19278 osd: check for null inode in osd_attr_get
commit.message:
LU-19278 osd: check for null inode in osd_attr_get

Check for null inode before trying to get attributes
in osd_attr_get to avoid kernel panic.

Test-Parameters: testlist=sanityn,sanity-benchmark
Change-Id: I8ed17ef0a781eaa703018d0f6f4c950dfe3a0a08
Signed-off-by: Sonia Sharma<sonia.sh.sharma@oracle.com>
OCI-bug-Id: LFS-4714
